---
title: "modelli_riccardo"
author: "Riccardo"
date: "2026-05-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.align = 'center')
```


```{r}
df <- read.csv("brfss24_sub.csv")
```


```{r}
df %>% 
  group_by(X_STATE) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(),
            prop = round((n/nrow(df))*100,2)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n))
```


## References

- [https://ikwak2.github.io/tutorials/BRFSS/BRFSS.html](https://ikwak2.github.io/tutorials/BRFSS/BRFSS.html)
